# Apex Windows & Exteriors

Apex Windows & Exteriors is a premier exterior home contractor serving Grimsby, Hamilton, Burlington, Brantford, and Southern Ontario. Specializing in window installation, door replacement, vinyl siding, eavestroughs, and gutter guards.

## Core Services

- **Window Installation**: Energy-efficient replacement windows (casement, double-hung, bay, picture).
- **Exterior Doors**: Custom entry doors and patio sliding doors (steel, fiberglass).
- **Vinyl Siding**: Premium low-maintenance siding installations and repairs.
- **Eavestroughs & Gutters**: Professional cleaning, seamless repairs, and heavy-duty gutter guards.
- **Soffit & Fascia**: Roofline protection and ventilation systems.
- **Decks & Fences**: Custom-built outdoor living spaces.

## Service Areas

- Grimsby, Hamilton, Burlington, Brantford, St. Catharines, Niagara Region, Ancaster, Stoney Creek, Beamsville, Caledonia, Paris, Binbrook.

## Contact Information

- **Phone**: 647-833-4262
- **Website**: https://www.apexwindowsexteriors.com
- **Email**: info@apexwindowsexteriors.com

## Technical SEO Status

- **Clean URLs**: Folder-based structure (/about/, /services/, /contact/).
- **SSL**: Secured via Vercel.
- **Performance**: Optimized for mobile LCP with preloaded hero assets and eager loading.
- **Trust Features**: Licensed & Insured, Lifetime Warranty on products, Price Match Guarantee.
